name: canshare-tnm-gist-other-stage-group
title: NZ AJCC gastrointestinal stromal tumour small intestine and/or oesophageal and/or colon and/or rectum and/or mesenteric and/or peritoneal stage group
description: The stage groups that describe how far a gastrointestinal stromal tumour (GIST) small intestine and/or oesophageal and/or colon and/or rectum and/or mesenteric and/or peritoneal has grown and spread, using the AJCC cancer staging manual (latest edition).
